query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_ativos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND neighborhood != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_bairro,
  SUM(CASE WHEN neighborhood IS NULL OR neighborhood = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_bairro
FROM establishments WHERE status = 'active';

  SUM(CASE WHEN neighborhood IS NULL OR neighborhood = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_bairro
